out_of_scope_note: Survey-methodology paper in Memory journal proposing a verbal three-factor framework (cognitive state, adequacy judgement, communicative intent) for respondents' 'Don't Know' answers. No neural recording, no computational model of the brain, no perceptual/decision-making/encoding claim — sits in social-science survey methodology territory rather than computational neuroscience. Out of scope per the social-science-without-neural-or-computational-brain-model rule.
